title: ASSISTIVE TECHNOLOGY LAB - 211info
text: COMMUNITY VISION INC ASSISTIVE TECHNOLOGY LAB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers consultations on communication, mobility, and smart home technology for individuals with disabilities. Additionally, facilitates social support groups and provides training on assistive technology. Eligibility: Adults and children with disabilities Hours: By appointment: Monday 9am-5pm Walk-in: Thursday noon-5pm; call to confirm Email (503) 292-4964 152 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 292-4964 ext 152 AT Lab Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or email for more information FEES: Initial consultation free, $75/hour ongoing consultation, scholarships available DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the SE corner of 20th and Division. Limited accessible parking in the garage. TriMet bus stops nearby. Services: Assistive Technology Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
